name: last30days
description: Research any topic from the last 30 days across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, and the web.

interface.shortDescription: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, and the web from the last 30 days.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-focused wrapper around last30days v2.9.5. The plugin bundles the upstream research skill and runtime scripts, while the installer configures Codex marketplace metadata and a SessionStart config check through ~/.codex/hooks.json.
defaultPrompt: Research the last 30 days of discussion around this topic.
Find what people are recommending right now for this tool.
Compare two tools based on the last 30 days of signals.
